# terrible_community_general_selogin (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `login` (String) A Linux user.

### Optional

- `ignore_selinux_state` (Boolean) Run independent of selinux runtime state.
- `reload` (Boolean) Reload SELinux policy after commit.
- `selevel` (String) MLS/MCS Security Range (MLS/MCS Systems only) SELinux Range for SELinux login mapping defaults to the SELinux user record range.
- `seuser` (String) SELinux user name.
- `state` (String) Desired mapping value.
